Est. 2009

Our Story

Built by stylists,
for stylists.

HAIRTOWN was born from frustration — the best professional tools were always locked behind distributor relationships and industry gatekeeping.

We opened our doors to give every hairstylist, from the newly qualified to the salon veteran, direct access to the same premium-grade products used in the world's top salons.

Every product in our range is hand-selected and tested by working professionals. If it doesn't perform in a real salon environment, it doesn't make the cut.

Learn More
